list.name: target
list.rawQuery: SELECT name FROM targets ORDER BY name

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT (strftime('%s', ts) / 60) * 60 * 1000 AS time, t.name AS metric, AVG(m.response_time_ms) AS value FROM metrics m JOIN targets t ON t.id = m.target_id WHERE $__unixEpochFilter(strftime('%s', m.ts)) AND t.name IN ($target) AND m.response_time_ms IS NOT NULL GROUP BY time, t.name ORDER BY time
SELECT 100.0 * SUM(success) / COUNT(*) AS uptime FROM metrics m JOIN targets t ON t.id = m.target_id WHERE $__unixEpochFilter(strftime('%s', m.ts)) AND t.name IN ($target)

SELECT (strftime('%s', ts) / 300) * 300 * 1000 AS time, t.name AS metric, SUM(CASE WHEN m.success = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS value FROM metrics m JOIN targets t ON t.id = m.target_id WHERE $__unixEpochFilter(strftime('%s', m.ts)) AND t.name IN ($target) GROUP BY time, t.name ORDER BY time

SELECT t.name AS endpoint, COUNT(*) AS samples, ROUND(AVG(m.response_time_ms), 1) AS avg_ms, ROUND(MAX(m.response_time_ms), 1) AS max_ms, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(m.success) / COUNT(*), 2) AS uptime_pct, SUM(CASE WHEN m.success = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS errors FROM metrics m JOIN targets t ON t.id = m.target_id WHERE $__unixEpochFilter(strftime('%s', m.ts)) AND t.name IN ($target) GROUP BY t.name ORDER BY avg_ms DESC
